step.title: Generate event listener goals (phase=event_listener)
step.rule: Infrastructure goals (phase=infrastructure) and fixtures goal (phase=fixtures) MUST exist in goals.yaml before this step runs. If either is missing, ABORT with error.
One goal per event listener — never batch multiple listeners into one goal.

Integration tests only — no Playwright E2E tests for event handlers (spec lines 329-332). Action E2E tests assert HTTP response + direct DB state; event side effects are tested here via integration tests.
All inputs read from docs/architecture/* files on disk (G-16), never from conversation context.

item.trigger: the event-listener goal authors an emission-check investigator (producer side)

criteria.item: EMISSION-CHECK TOPOLOGY BINDING. Derive the emission-check investigator's `paths` / grep target from the event PRODUCER's FQCN — map ProductivityTool\<Ctx>\Domain\Event\... to contexts/<ctx-lowercased>/src/ (lowercase the <Ctx> namespace segment to its bounded-context directory; sources live under contexts/<bc>/src per task-plan-generate.xml topology-binding). NEVER emit a hardcoded Symfony-conventional src/Bundle/Application/. ON-DISK FALLBACK: the authored path MUST exist on disk. If the initial producer-FQCN derivation does not resolve to an existing directory, fall back to the producer-context-derived contexts/<ctx-lowercased>/src/, and failing that the nearest existing ancestor under contexts/<bc>/src. NEVER author an emission-check over a nonexistent directory — grep exits 2 there (neither the documented pass=0 nor fail=1), so the investigator can never pass.

substep.title: Read event inventory from discovery output
substep.action: Read docs/architecture/domain-model.md. For each BC, collect EVENTS_PER_AGGREGATE — the domain events listed under each aggregate's events section (written by discover.xml Step 3).
Read docs/architecture/context-mapping.md (if it exists — skipped for single-BC projects per D-27). Identify cross-BC event flows: producer BC, consumer BC.
Build EVENT_LISTENER_LIST where each entry contains:

fields.field: event_name — the domain event class name (past tense, e.g. ReservationConfirmed)
source_bc — the BC that raises the event (aggregate root's BC)
listener_bc — the BC that handles the event (same as source_bc for intra-BC, different for cross-BC)

handler_class_path — contexts/{listener_bc}/app/src/Adapter/{EventName}Handler.php (cross-BC message processor) or contexts/{listener_bc}/app/src/EventListener/{EventName}Listener.php (intra-BC) — both live in the context app (framework) layer. Used here only to derive the coarse deliverable_area.
side_effect_summary — short description of what the handler does (from discovery output)

branch.action: Print: "No event listeners found in discovery output — skipping Step 3.20"
SKIP — proceed to next step. Do NOT call goal-create.

substep.title: Resolve dependency goal IDs

fields.field: OWN_BC_INFRA_GOAL_ID — the infrastructure goal (phase=infrastructure) for the listener's BC (listener_bc)

substep.action: For cross-BC listeners (is_cross_bc == true), also find:

fields.field: SOURCE_BC_INFRA_GOAL_ID — the infrastructure goal for the source BC (event dispatch must exist before listener can consume)

check.condition: OWN_BC_INFRA_GOAL_ID not found for any listener
check.action: ABORT with error: "Cannot generate event listener goal: no infrastructure goal (phase=infrastructure) found for BC {{listener_bc}} in goals.yaml"
ABORT with error: "Cannot generate event listener goals: no fixtures goal (phase=fixtures) found in goals.yaml — ensure fixtures step ran first"

substep.title: Generate one goal skeleton per event listener via goal-create

per-listener.action: Set LISTENER_AREA = contexts/{listener_bc}/app/src/ — the context app (framework) layer directory where the handler/listener (and any cross-BC Adapter) lives, derived as the coarse parent of handler_class_path. COARSE deliverable directory (the elaborator's tree-read anchor; it refines into the precise handler/DI/integration-test/ACL footprint at dispatch against real files). NOT a per-file path, NOT a glob.
Call the goal-create MCP tool with a roadmap SKELETON:

params.param: Short title, <=120 chars. Pattern: "Event listener: {EventName} handler in {listener_bc} — {side_effect_summary}" Examples: - "Event listener: ReservationConfirmed handler in Notification — send confirmation email" - "Event listener: PaymentCompleted handler in Booking — update reservation payment status" - "Event listener: GuestCheckedIn handler in Housekeeping — schedule room cleaning"
DEPENDS_ON from substep 3.20.2 (own BC infra + fixtures, optionally source BC infra for cross-BC)

per-listener.action: After each successful goal-create, record the returned goal ID. Append to EVENT_LISTENER_GOAL_IDS list.

check.action: Print error with event name, listener BC, and full context. ABORT — do not continue to next listener.

per-listener.rule: Description must be ≤120 characters (MaxGoalDescriptionLength invariant). If the natural description exceeds 120 chars, truncate the side_effect_summary while preserving EventName and BC.
max_retries=3 per G-11. phase=event_listener on every created goal.

NO acceptance/validate/scope/context/investigation_config/not_in_scope params — roadmap skeleton; /tmux:elaborate authors EV-01..EV-13 (incl. the is_cross_bc/async conditionals and the integration-tests-only validate) at dispatch against the REAL tree (design §5/§6). NEVER run `tmux-cli rules match` here.

substep.title: Record event listener goal IDs and report
substep.action: Store EVENT_LISTENER_GOAL_IDS list as a session variable for downstream reference (step 3.24 Messenger depends on these).
Print summary: "Event listener skeletons created: {{N_event_listeners}} goals (phase=event_listener, status=roadmap), IDs: [{{EVENT_LISTENER_GOAL_IDS}}]"
For each goal, print: " - goal-{{ID}}: {{event_name}} in {{listener_bc}} (depends_on={{DEPENDS_ON}}, cross_bc={{is_cross_bc}})"
